headline: Ansible
description: Ansible (Michael DeHaan, 2012, acquired by Red Hat 2015) is an agentless IT automation tool for configuration management, deployment, and orchestration. Uses YAML playbooks and SSH — no agent to install on target machines. Idempotent: running same playbook multiple times produces same result.

citation.name: Ansible: Up and Running (4th Edition, 2025)
citation.author: Meijer B., Hochstein L., Moser R.

citation.name: Configuration Management in Cloud-Native Era: 2025 Survey
citation.author: multiple
